global.title: Iran has closed Strait of Hormuz, state media reports - NBC News
global.summary: Iran’s state media says the Strait of Hormuz has been closed, a sharp escalation after recent talk of a peace deal and renewed uncertainty in the region.
global.whyItMatters: This affects global stability, fuel prices, and prayerful attention to a volatile conflict that shapes many lives.

global.title: Iran Delays Nuclear Talks With US as Lebanon Clashes Worsen - Yahoo Finance
global.summary: Planned U.S.-Iran nuclear talks have been delayed while fighting in Lebanon intensifies, suggesting the diplomatic opening remains fragile.
global.whyItMatters: It is a reminder to lead congregations in prayer for peacemaking, restraint, and civilians caught between regional powers.

global.title: Congo says 933 Ebola cases confirmed, including 245 deaths - TradingView
global.summary: Congo reports 933 confirmed Ebola cases and 245 deaths, underscoring a serious public health emergency with growing human cost.
global.whyItMatters: Pastors may want to pray for suffering communities, health workers, and wise global compassion in the face of disease and fear.

canadian.title: US and Iran to talk Sunday in Switzerland as Tehran says it closed Strait of Hormuz again - CTV News
canadian.summary: CTV reports the U.S. and Iran are set to talk Sunday in Switzerland even as Tehran says it has again closed the Strait of Hormuz.
canadian.whyItMatters: Canadian pastors should watch this because it may affect economic anxiety, public conversation, and how people process world instability.

canadian.title: MDA Space buying U.S. company Blue Canyon Technologies - Castanet
canadian.summary: Canadian company MDA Space is buying Blue Canyon Technologies in a deal valued at $874 million, expanding its role in spacecraft and satellite manufacturing.
canadian.whyItMatters: It is a constructive Canadian business story that speaks to innovation, vocation, and the stewardship of national talent and industry.

canadian.title: Blue Jays erase 5-run deficit in 8-6 win - ESPN
canadian.summary: Toronto rallied from five runs down to beat its opponent 8-6 in a comeback win.
canadian.whyItMatters: A light national story can offer a simple illustration of perseverance, hope, and not giving up when behind.

local.title: US and Iran to talk Sunday in Switzerland as Tehran says it closed Strait of Hormuz again - CTV News
local.summary: Among the regional items attached to this CTV page are Kelowna drug-trafficking arrests, a Nanaimo stolen credit card investigation, and a Royal Roads National Indigenous Peoples Day gathering.
local.whyItMatters: These B.C. angles touch public safety, reconciliation, and community life close to home for a pastor serving in British Columbia.

persecutedChurch.title: China detains two leaders of influential underground church - BBC
persecutedChurch.summary: Chinese authorities detained two leaders of a major underground church after a raid in which dozens were taken for questioning and congregants reportedly kept singing and praying.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: This is a direct call to pray for courage, endurance, and protection for believers facing state pressure.

persecutedChurch.title: Chinese police swarm church, detain dozens in Sunday morning raid - Newsweek
persecutedChurch.summary: Newsweek reports another major crackdown on an unregistered Chinese church, with officials defending the action as normal religious regulation.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: It helps frame the broader pattern of tightening control over Christian worship and can guide informed intercession.

leadership.title: Continuous Disruption Is Reshaping Workforce Psychology - Forbes
leadership.summary: Forbes argues that in an age of ongoing disruption, leaders must build trust, reduce anxiety, and strengthen people’s capacity to navigate change.
leadership.whyItMatters: Useful for pastoral leadership: people in the church are carrying exhaustion and uncertainty, and steady presence matters.

goodNews.title: Yanks take on a different kind of yard work in HOPE Week outing - MLB.com
goodNews.summary: The Yankees joined a nonprofit that provides free lawn care for older adults, veterans, and neighbors in hardship, then gave the ministry a $20,000 gift.
goodNews.whyItMatters: It is a tangible picture of loving your neighbor through practical service, with easy application for local church ministry.
